name: bazi-ishengmind
description: 八字命理分析技能包 — BaZi destiny analysis skill based on DiTianSui (滴天髓). Understand yourself, feel your inner energy, and find your optimal path through life.

plugins.name: bazi-ishengmind
plugins.description: 以《滴天髓》思想为核心的八字命理分析技能。分析日主强弱、五行气势、通关之法、大运流年内在感受变化。不论外在人事，直言结论。
